Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 15
DMG: 5 Dmg Bonus: 36
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD MNK BST BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

# Sep 30 2003 at 11:20 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594573315725
View User Forum
127 posts
Just got this lastnight on a GM event. Haven't used it yet but I can't wait to see what kind of damage this does at level 65. Yah this will never ever be my main weapon, but if I can find a nice LDoN Proc it may make it worth hanging on to.
▲ Page top
the ultimate 2hb trainer
QuoteReply
# Dec 26 2002 at 10:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772738273
77 posts
don't know why this is no longer dropped, maybe VI thought it was just too fast? but the mosscovered twig was nerfed from primary/secondary to secondary only, because someone brought the twig (once easily attainable) to some Best of the Best and totally cleaned house (remember speed is more important in primary and ratio in secondary).

i'm pretty sure there's a 3/10 1hb primary-equippable weapon still in the game. Efreeti Stick of SmackingYouAround or something. i'll post when i have more info.
▲ Page top

What mob drops this weapon? I'm regularily in FM and been looking for a weapon to train my 2 hand blunt skill.

RE: Who?
QuoteReply
# May 08 2002 at 2:15 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1638145982070
View User Forum
Sage
201 posts
Go with a ketchata Koro Mis, 7/30, not a good ratio, but one of the fastest 2hb a war can get. and only about 30pp. But if your a young monk, go bamboo bo stick, 8/20 and only about 50pp.

Edited, Wed May 8 03:13:05 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Who?
QuoteReply
# Jan 01 2003 at 11:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758708303
9 posts
The fastest 2HB for non Monks would be Abandoned Orc Shovel... 4/27 ratio, found on the ground in an orc camp in Lake Rathe. No Drop.

RE: Who?
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2003 at 5:27 PM Rating: Decent
Valdon
674 posts
I have picked it up. Id have to be looking at a map, or even better, be playing the game. But there is a mage either human or high elf.... its been a LONG time. But hes a wizzy looking guy, and in his tent was a shovel. Its kind of interesting how they do that with that, and the swords in EC at the camps.... I am about 90% sure I also used it on my druid? I cant remember I had some silly combo going.
